subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #059 Man's Comprehension of God
subcodes.first_line: This subject requires ample time, and to explain it at table will be difficult.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مسئله را زمان فرصت لازم و در سر ناهار بیان مشکل است
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @human reality created in the image of God, @Manifestation of God as mirror
